name: Raspberry Chocolate Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine crumbs, cocoa, and sugar in a bowl. Stir in melted butter. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until lightly golden. Cool completely.
Filling:
Preheat oven to 425°F.
Beat cream cheese with 3/4 cup sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla until smooth. Add eggs, beating until well blended.
In a small bowl, mix cocoa and remaining 1/4 cup sugar. Stir in oil and the remaining 1/2 teaspoon vanilla.
Add half of the raspberry spread and flour mixture to the cream cheese mixture, blending well.
Pour half of this mixture into the crust-lined pan. Dollop about half of the chocolate mixture on top.
Repeat with the remaining filling, ending with dollops of chocolate on top.
Gently swirl the batter with a knife.
Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for an additional 55 minutes.
